Generate images based on user prompts

content.text: Generate an image of Microsoft logo.

output.revised_prompt: High-resolution, clean rendition of the official Microsoft logo. Centered composition on a transparent background. Left: the four-square window icon composed of four equal squares (top-left red #F25022, top-right green #7FBA00, bottom-left blue #00A4EF, bottom-right yellow #FFB900) with crisp, flat colors and sharp edges. Right: the wordmark "Microsoft" in Segoe UI (or a very close geometric sans-serif) in neutral medium gray (#737373), proper spacing and alignment as in the official brand mark. Minimal spacing between icon and wordmark, no additional elements, no text beyond the wordmark, no shadows or reflections, no watermarks. Vector-style, ultra-clean, 3000x1500 px, suitable for use on light and dark backgrounds (provide transparent PNG).
